description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling, L-shaped footprint and a low-pitched, dark gray hip roof. The exterior walls are a light beige or cream color, complemented by white trim around the windows and doors. A prominent feature is the covered porch supported by white columns, located at the rear of the building, providing a sheltered outdoor space. The structure includes a two-car garage with a driveway leading up to it, and multiple large windows are distributed across all visible facades, allowing for ample natural light. The roofline is complex, with several intersecting hips and a curved section above the porch area. The bungalow sits on a neatly manicured green lawn, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A spacious, single-story L-shaped bungalow with a dark hip roof, light walls, a covered porch, and an attached garage, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, and driveway, with the hip roof and light-colored facade visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the elongated wing of the bungalow, with multiple windows along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the covered porch with white columns, curved roof section, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side windows, and the extended roofline over the main living area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
